name: Perspective Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Perspective Therapeutics is a radiopharmaceutical development company that uses the alpha-emitting isotope Lead-212 to deliver radiation to cancer cells. It is developing targeted alpha therapies for neuroendocrine tumors, melanoma, and solid tumors. The company also develops complementary imaging diagnostics for personalized treatment.

exposures.sentence: We are a radiopharmaceutical development company pioneering advanced treatments for cancers throughout the body.
We are also developing complementary imaging diagnostics that incorporate the same targeting moieties.

catalysts.event: Completion of at least 32 weeks of follow-up for eight DLT patients in VMT-α-NET Cohort 3
catalysts.sentence: By mid-2026, the eight DLT patients would have had the opportunity for at least 32 weeks of follow up since beginning treatment, which is sufficient time to have completed at least one scan following the full course of treatment.

catalysts.event: Expect all 46 patients in VMT-α-NET Cohort 2 to have at least 48 weeks of follow-up
catalysts.sentence: By mid-2026, we expect all 46 patients in Cohort 2 would have had the opportunity for at least 48 weeks of follow up since beginning treatment.

catalysts.event: At least 24 weeks of follow-up for 10 patients receiving VMT01 3.0 mCi treatment
catalysts.sentence: By late 2026, the 10 patients who had received VMT01 3.0 mCi treatment since the initiation or re-opening of these cohorts in September 2025 would have had the opportunity for at least 24 weeks of follow up after their initial doses, which is sufficient time to receive at least one scan after their full treatment (up to three doses every eight weeks).

catalysts.event: At least 32 weeks of follow-up for PSV359 patients
catalysts.sentence: By late 2026, these patients would have had the opportunity for at least 32 weeks of follow up after their initial doses, which is sufficient time to have completed at least one scan after the full course of treatment (up to four doses every eight weeks).

catalysts.event: Completion of Somerset production suite upgrade for Phase 3 activities
catalysts.sentence: An existing production suite in Somerset is being upgraded to support Phase 3 activities, with installation targeted for completion by mid-2026.
A fourth production suite has also been installed and completed, and we expect it to be operational in 2026.
